etymology.description: Phonetic жЈҐ with semantic component (р ¬њ) -> variant of жЁЉ(жЁЉ) (fГЎn, "fence")
etymology.interpretation: жЈҐ is a variant form of жЁЉ(жЁЉ) (fГЎn, "fence"), using the same phonetic element but differing in its semantic component. It combines the phonetic element жЈҐ, possibly indicating a similar sound, with semantic hints from р ¬њ, whose exact meaning in this context is not clearly defined.
